title: Further education workforce in England, 2023 to 2024
body: "This publication shows the size of the further education workforce, and characteristics of the workforce, including:   ethnicity gender disability status age   It shows:   subjects taught by teaching staff working patterns and contract types further education workforce pay unfilled teaching and management and leadership vacancies unfilled governor vacancies   It shows governor characteristics, including:   ethnicity gender disability status age length of service   The release contains information at national and regional levels. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
